title: BSNC Welcomes Tony Ahzooak Weyiouanna Sr. As New Board Director
summary: BSNC is pleased to announce the election of Tony Ahzooak Weyiouanna, Sr. as a BSNC Board Director. He previously served on the BSNC Board from 2007 to 2010. Originally from Shishmaref, Weyiouanna now resides in Nome, AK. Weyiouanna, now retired, served as the Program Director of Land Management for...

title: 2023 Delegate Survey
summary: Dear AFN Delegate, As part of our ongoing efforts to improve the effectiveness and direction of AFN, we would like to invite our members to participate in a survey . The survey is designed to gain insights into our members’ perspectives on AFN’s five-year strategy, as well as identify our strengths...

title: Later fall freezes, earlier thaws increase Interior Alaska growing season
summary: If Interior Alaskans have noticed that summer lingers long enough to ripen their tomatoes and winter arrives more slowly, they’re not imagining things. Nine of the 10 latest “first freezes” have occurred since 2001. The median first freeze date is now two weeks later than it was pre-World War II, International Arctic Research Center...
